title: Finite Givens Rotation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Givens bad sine coefficient QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Givens replay computes the sine coefficient as 4/5 while a malformed row claims 3/5, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional orthogonal-factorization rows only when they add distinct zeroing, product, least-squares, residual, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep QR/Givens algorithm correctness, pivoting, conditioning, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational cosine/sine coefficients, Givens rotation matrix, source vector, zeroed vector, inverse reconstruction, determinant, and orthogonality identity as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false sine coefficient through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes s = 4/5.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, QR/factorization, orthogonal-transform, and exact-vs-floating learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep general Givens/QR algorithm correctness, pivoting, conditioning, and floating-point stability marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
